creator: np@FreeBSD.org
text: Vincenzo can probably tell us what the expected behavior is, but bugzilla wouldn't let me add him to the CC list.  What happens to the queues that do not have netmap enabled -- do they continue to work normally or not?  How does netmap ensure that it gets all the rx traffic (if it does that) and the non-netmap-enabled queues are quiesced?
